openCtaTitle: Dictate items to add to the cart
modalDescription: Speak the items to add, for example: agrega dos cocas y un pan.
promptIdle: Tap to start recording — up to 30 seconds.
noMatches: No products matched. Try again with clearer names.
permissionDeniedHint: Microphone access was denied. Allow the mic in your browser settings.
unsupportedHint: Your browser does not support audio recording.
disabledNoModule: Voice commands are not active for this tenant.
disabledNoAi: AI is disabled at the tenant level.
disabledResumed: Resume cart is locked; discard it to record voice commands.
disabledNoSession: Open a cash session before recording voice commands.
